SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARCOS PENA - MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
